hypothesis: Introducing a transition-metal–aware delta-correction that encodes metal identity (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni), nominal oxidation/spin state, and local d-electron occupancy into the ∆-learning XGBoost framework will reduce the MAE of HSE06 band-gap predictions for MOFs containing 3d transition metals by at least 0.15 eV on a held-out test set relative to the baseline xTB-based ∆-learning model.
